page: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-3xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server configured with an AMD EPYC 9575F processor. This x86_64 architecture CPU provides 20 physical cores and 20 vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz with a shared allocation model. The system features 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding 12.8 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it bundles three NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 144 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not included in this configuration.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core, Geekbench single-core, and single-threaded compression and decompression tests placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory performance is also highly competitive, with the Passmark memory score reaching the top 10% and memory bandwidth tests consistently placing in the top 25%.

Given the high density of GPU resources and system memory relative to the 20 vCPUs, this server offers high resource density for specialized workloads. The lack of local storage requires external storage solutions, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This configuration is highly suited for GPU-accelerated workloads, data science tasks, machine learning model training, and memory-intensive parallel processing.
description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-3xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring an AMD EPYC 9575F processor with 20 vCPUs and 20 physical cores. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory and three NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 144 GB of VRAM. The server does not include local storage. In benchmark evaluations, the system demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU and memory performance, alongside strong multi-core processing capabilities. This hardware profile is highly efficient for memory-intensive parallel computing and GPU-accelerated workloads, such as machine learning and data science, though users must provision external storage.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-3xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 20 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and three NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 144 GB VRAM, optimized for parallel computing and machine learning.

tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring three NVIDIA L40S accelerators and 256 GB of RAM for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Three NVIDIA L40S GPUs providing 144 GB of total VRAM
AMD EPYC 9575F processor with 20 physical cores and vCPUs
256 GB of system memory providing 12.8 GB per core
Top-tier single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
Designed for GPU-accelerated parallel processing and machine learning
